title: Smoky Jamaican Dumplings
description: A vegetarian twist on traditional Jamaican fare, featuring smoky and flaky dumplings.

ingredients.name: jamaican spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of thyme, cinnamon, and nutmeg

instructions: Roll out flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a bowl, mix together smoky cheddar cheese, jamaican spices, onion, and garlic.
Place the cheese mixture in the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around it.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Brush with a little water and sprinkle with extra jamaican spices.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
